channel.title: ai on Oleksandr Kulbida
channel.description: Recent content in ai on Oleksandr Kulbida

item.title: 16 GitHub Repos Every AI Engineer Should Know in 2026
item.description: Came across a great list by Ana Pedra on LinkedIn that I thought was worth sharing with some of my own notes. If you’re building AI systems in production — or just getting started — these repos are worth bookmarking. LLM Serving & Inference vLLM (66k+ stars) — The industry standard for high-throughput LLM serving. Continuous batching and maximum GPU utilization. If you’re serving LLMs in production, this is probably what you should be using.
